seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
response:
Subject: Join Our New Literary Adventure!

I am thrilled to invite you to join our brand-new book club starting next month. Our goal is to explore diverse genres, share unique perspectives, and foster deep conversations about compelling stories. It will be a wonderful way for us to unwind, connect, and discover hidden gems together while enjoying some delicious snacks and great company.

We plan to meet on the third Saturday of every month at my home for our discussions. Each member will take turns selecting a book for the group to read before our gathering. I want to ensure everyone feels included, so please share your favorite genres or specific titles you have been dying to read lately.

Please let me know by this Friday if you would like to participate in this exciting journey. Once we have a final headcount, I will send out the first book selection and the official meeting details. I truly hope you can join us for these meaningful evenings of literary exploration and friendship. I look forward to it!<turn|>
